sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80907" key="pepero/garon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεπερό-γᾰρον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n80907.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">peppered</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γάρον</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:1:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.15</biblScope> </bibl> (written <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πιπερό-</orth>).</sense> </entryFree>
